calendar.matters:
Report Of Administration By Administrator On Waiver Of Accounting; For Allowance Of Reimbursement Of Costs Of Administration; For Waiver Of Statutory Commission To Executor And Allowance Of Statutory Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Shelf (Petitioner) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Shelf stated that the Deceased Personal Representative's boyfriend restored sufficient funds to close the estate. The Court granted the Report of Administration by Administrator on Waiver of Accounting, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
